betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Fluid Output§f

§aPlace fluids back into the world or produce XP!§f

§6Fluid Drain§f (`pressure:drain`):
Connects to Pressure or normal pipes. If a fluid that can be placed in the world is piped in, and the block in front is Air with at least a bucket available — §bplaces a source block§f. If §bliquid XP or mob essence§f is piped in — produces XP orbs instead. Any extra fluid is instantly destroyed. §bCan be filtered§f.

§6Sluice§f (`pressure:sluice`):
Connects to Pressure or normal pipes. Only accepts fluids that can be placed in the world. Only accepts §bone bucket at a time§f. If the block in front is Air with at least a bucket piped in — places a source block. §bCan be filtered§f.

§eTip§f: Drain can place any placeable fluid and handles XP/essence. Sluice only handles world-placeable fluids, one bucket at a time. Both are essential for automated fluid disposal and XP farming setups.
